steps.title: Identify the contrasting judgments
steps.content: Text 1 concludes negatively: the whoop “could be more irritating than enjoyable.” Text 2 pivots positively: “could also be genuinely fun or even moving… doesn't mean the whoop was never used well.” The key signal is the opposing judgments of the pattern itself.

steps.title: Match the judgments to the answer choices
steps.content: Text 1 introduces a negative view of the pattern; Text 2 presents a more positive one. B directly captures this shift. A, C, and D describe different content entirely. That matches choice B — B is correct.
